name: Beautyrest Black Series 1
tagline: Luxury support built for side sleepers
description: Where luxury meets innovation. The Series 1 delivers individualized support, all-night heat transfer, and contouring pressure relief for a truly restful sleep.

details.Support: Triple-Stranded Pocketed Coil Technology offers lasting, individualized support
details.Pressure Relief: Beautyrest Gel Memory Foam contours to your body for exceptional pressure relief
details.Temperature: Sleep Climate Technology helps transfer heat away from the body all night
details.Motion Separation: Triple-Stranded Pocketed Coil Technology offers advanced motion separation for an undisturbed rest

name: Beautyrest Black Series 2
tagline: Instant pressure relief for all sleep styles
description: SurfaceTouch Gel Memory Foam quilted directly into the surface delivers instant pressure relief the moment you lie down.

details.Support: Triple-Stranded Pocketed Coil Technology offers lasting, individualized support
details.Pressure Relief: SurfaceTouch Gel Memory Foam is quilted directly into the mattress surface for instant pressure relief
details.Temperature: Sleep Climate Technology and Micro Diamond Memory Foam help transfer heat away from the body
details.Motion Separation: Triple-Stranded Pocketed Coil Technology offers advanced motion separation for an undisturbed rest

name: Beautyrest Black Series 3
description: Self-Response Latex and 2K Nano Coils in the pillow top deliver enhanced, individualized support with responsive pressure relief for all sleep positions.

details.Support: Triple-Stranded Pocketed Coil Technology plus 2K Nano Coils in Pillow Top models offer enhanced, individualized support
details.Pressure Relief: Self-Response Latex and SurfaceTouch Gel Memory Foam conform to your body for responsive pressure relief
details.Temperature: Sleep Climate Technology and Micro Diamond Memory Foam help transfer heat away from the body
details.Motion Separation: Triple-Stranded Pocketed Coil Technology offers advanced motion separation for an undisturbed rest

name: Beautyrest Black Series 4
description: The pinnacle of the Beautyrest Black line. 4K Nano Coils provide our most premium individualized support for an unmatched sleep experience.

details.Support: Triple-Stranded Pocketed Coil Technology and 4K Nano Coils offer our most premium individualized support
details.Pressure Relief: Self-Response Latex and SurfaceTouch Gel Memory Foam conform to your body for responsive pressure relief
details.Temperature: Sleep Climate Technology and Micro Diamond Memory Foam help transfer heat away from the body
details.Motion Separation: Triple-Stranded Pocketed Coil Technology offers advanced motion separation for an undisturbed rest

name: Baselogic Platinum Adjustable Base
description: The Baselogic Platinum transforms your bed into a fully personalized sleep system. Raise, lower, and fine-tune your position with a wireless remote — then let the built-in massage and sound therapy do the rest.

details.Comfort: Head, foot, and neck adjustability — raise or lower into the ideal sleep or lounge position
details.Relaxation: Dual whisper-quiet massage settings to help you drift to sleep
details.Sound: Integrated sound therapy — select white, pink, or brown noise for a soothing experience
details.Convenience: USB-A & C charging ports, memory preset, foldable for easy moving and storage
details.Warranty: 20-year warranty — compatible with all Beautyrest mattresses
